name_cn:
Chanel SS2022 New Pearl CF
Size: 25.5(cm)
In stock 22c New Pearl Flap Bag
The most beautiful pearl CF of the season ✔️
Velvet material surface inlaid with many crystal pearls of different sizes ⚪️ Plus sparkling crystal rhinestones bling✨bling, extremely dazzling 👀 Mini double C logo inlaid in the pearl quilted pattern, truly the finishing touch 🐲, instantly elevating the bag's noble quality! Equipped with CF vintage woven metal shoulder strap, small and exquisite ☑️
Uses original fabric and hardware, 1:1 restoration of the authentic look
Multiple carrying styles: Shoulder, Crossbody, Handheld. Suitable for any height, easy to carry 〰️
